ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product (e.g., 16x8) */,
  "bolt_pattern" TEXT /* Bolt pattern of the product (e.g., 6-5.5) */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset of the product */,
  "backspace" REAL /* Backspace of the product in inches */,
  "max_load_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum load capacity of the product */,
  "finish" TEXT /* Finish of the product (e.g., Chrome) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., thumbnail, full-size) */,
  "image_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the image should be displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method chosen for the order */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product at the time of order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the review was posted */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist item */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product on the wishlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the shipping address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact during delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
